titulo: 1,800 Hit in Mini Shai-Hulud Attack on SAP, Lightning, Intercom
resumo: The compromised Lightning and Intercom packages have a combined monthly download count of nearly 10 million. The post 1,800 Hit in Mini Shai-Hulud Attack on SAP, Lightning, Intercom appeared first on SecurityWeek.

titulo: Hackers are actively exploiting a bug in cPanel, used by millions of websites | TechCrunch
resumo: Web hosts are scrambling to fix the bug under active attack by hackers. One company said hackers have been abusing the bug for months.

titulo: After dissing Anthropic for limiting Mythos, OpenAI restricts access to Cyber, too | TechCrunch
resumo: OpenAI will begin rolling out it cybersecurity testing tool, GPT-5.5 Cyber only "to critical cyber defenders" at first.

titulo: Mythos legend ups cybersecurity stakes
resumo: India is seeking access to Anthropic's powerful AI tool, Mythos. This AI can find software security flaws quickly. India believes its digital infrastructure needs this protection. The government is discussing access with the US administration. This move aims …

titulo: Great responsibility, without great power
resumo: In this week’s newsletter, Hazel uses International Superhero Day as a springboard to explore why empathy — rather than just technical prowess — is the most essential, underrated superpower for navigating the human side of cybersecurity.

titulo: AI won’t fix broken systems: India needs secure-by-design approach

titulo: Anthropic's new Claude Security tool scans your codebase for flaws - and helps you decide what to fix first
resumo: It uses Opus 4.7 to scan, validate, and generate patches, helping fix dangerous flaws before they can be exploited.

titulo: Dental practice software maker fixes bug that exposed patients' medical records | TechCrunch
resumo: Exclusive: The security bug is now fixed, but the patient who found it said it was challenging to alert the software company about the issue.

titulo: New Linux ‘Copy Fail’ flaw gives hackers root on major distros
resumo: An exploit has been published for a local privilege escalation vulnerability dubbed "Copy Fail" that impacts Linux kernels released since 2017, allowing an unprivileged local attacker to gain root permissions. [...]

titulo: Empowering the Amazon: Cisco Networking Academy
resumo: Cisco has brought networking and security skills to more than one million Brazilians. With its vast untapped wealth of talent, the Amazon is a critical focus. More RSS Feeds: https://newsroom.cisco.com/c/r/newsroom/en/us/rss-feeds.html
